title: Lost At Sea
content:
Lost at sea, with all on board!
    No one saw their sinking sail,
    No one heard their dying wail,
    Heard them calling on the Lord--
    Lost at sea, with all on board.

    Till the sea gives up its dead,
    There they lie in quiet sleep,
    And the voices of the deep
    Sound unheeded overhead,
    Till the sea gives up its dead.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Fuller Murray, titled "Lost At Sea", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
